productDisplayName: Nike Men Sweet Classic High Black Casual Shoes
description: Style NoteIf you want the ultimate sensation of comfort for your feet, then these Sweet Classic High shoes from nike are just made for you. Designed for the tennis-lover, these shoes are a great combination of comfort and style. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Product DetailsSynthetic upper with perforated side panels for superior breathability and protection from bad odour and sweat Lace-ups made of durable twill tape for snug Fit Lightly cushioned collar and tongue for extra comfort Appliquéd swoosh on the sides to create a style statement Embroidered logo on the back of collar for added fashionable touchHigh ankle for better support to the lower legEVA midsole for advanced lightweight cushioningRubber outsole in herringbone pattern for superior traction and durability Exaggerated herringbone grooves on the outsole for easy movement on the courtMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
